query:
DELETE d1 FROM draw_results d1
INNER JOIN draw_results d2
ON d1.gameType = d2.gameType
  AND DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(d1.drawDate/1000)) = DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(d2.drawDate/1000))
  AND COALESCE(d1.drawTime, 'none') = COALESCE(d2.drawTime, 'none')
  AND CAST(d1.mainNumbers AS CHAR) = CAST(d2.mainNumbers AS CHAR)
  AND d1.id > d2.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4TyHE3rVc6QyPw4.ad97ac670d8e --database 6J86Kiyju8nzk4hczi9dXp --execute DELETE d1 FROM draw_results d1
INNER JOIN draw_results d2
ON d1.gameType = d2.gameType
  AND DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(d1.drawDate/1000)) = DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(d2.drawDate/1000))
  AND COALESCE(d1.drawTime, 'none') = COALESCE(d2.drawTime, 'none')
  AND CAST(d1.mainNumbers AS CHAR) = CAST(d2.mainNumbers AS CHAR)
  AND d1.id > d2.id;
